creator: liangtai.s4@gmail.com
text:
In few days, qmmp-0.6.4 has been released.

I drop off the previous patch, then upload a new patch for
the port to upgrade into the version 0.6.4, and that provides
OPTIONS_SINGLE courses of 4 ports for ffmpeg different versions,
and 2 ports for mplayer different versions.

SimaMoto,RyÅTa <liangtai.s4@gmail.com>
